Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First I should recall the typical sequence Create Purchase Requisition Approve Purchase Requisition Issue Purchase Order Receive Goods Vendor Invoice Received Match Invoice to PO Release Payment Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Deviations from this order or missing steps could indicate issues like control weaknesses or operational risks
